g.title: public.action_parameter:model_key->public.data_type:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, data_type_key) REFERENCES data_type(model_key, data_type_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.action_parameter:model_key->public.action:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, action_key) REFERENCES action(model_key, action_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.action_parameter_invariant:model_key->public.action_parameter:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, action_key, parameter_key) REFERENCES action_parameter(model_key, action_key, parameter_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.action_parameter_simulation_require:model_key->public.action_parameter:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, action_key, parameter_key) REFERENCES action_parameter(model_key, action_key, parameter_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.action_parameter_simulation_spec:model_key->public.action_parameter:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, action_key, parameter_key) REFERENCES action_parameter(model_key, action_key, parameter_key) ON DELETE CASCADE
